# AISearch Global
https://aisearch.global

> AISearch Global is a specialist Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO) agency based in Sydney, Australia. We help Australian businesses get found, cited, and recommended inside AI-generated answers on ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, DeepSeek, and Grok.

AISearch Global focuses exclusively on AEO, not traditional SEO. Our work helps brands move from ranking in blue-link results to being actively recommended by generative AI engines in response to natural language queries.

## Core Services

- [AI Visibility Audit](/services/aeo-audit.html): A comprehensive baseline assessment of how AI engines currently find, describe, and recommend your business. Delivers a prioritised 90-day action plan.
- [Content Restructuring](/services/content-restructuring.html): Converts existing website copy into answer-ready formats optimised for RAG systems and LLM extraction.
- [Schema Implementation](/services/schema-implementation.html): Deploys structured JSON-LD and entity markup to strengthen semantic trust and machine comprehension of your business.
- [AI Brand Presence](/services/ai-brand-presence.html): Builds consistent entity signals across the data sources used as grounding references by large language models.
- [Structured Content Systems](/services/structured-content-systems.html): Creates reusable publishing frameworks that produce machine-readable, high-utility pages at scale.
- [AI Visibility Strategy](/services/ai-visibility-strategy.html): Aligns your AEO optimisation roadmap with specific business revenue targets and priority market queries.

## Free Diagnostic Tool

- [AISearch Global AEO Calculator](/aeo-calculator.html): A free, instant AI visibility scorecard. Enter your website URL, industry, and location to receive a numeric score out of 100, a letter grade (A to F), an AI recommendation likelihood score, a plain-English interpretation, a highest-impact fix recommendation, and an industry benchmark comparison. Scores 13 AEO signals including title tag, meta description, H1, content depth, JSON-LD schema, FAQ content, About page, contact signals, review signals, location signals, industry keyword relevance, sitemap.xml, and robots.txt.

## Insights

- [What Is AEO? Answer Engine Optimisation Explained](/insights/what-is-aeo-answer-engine-optimisation.html): A foundational guide to Answer Engine Optimisation — what it is, how it differs from SEO, and why it matters for businesses as AI-generated answers replace traditional search results. Published 24 May 2026.
- [How AI Decides Which Businesses to Recommend](/insights/how-ai-decides-which-businesses-to-recommend.html): An explanation of the signals, data sources, and trust factors that determine whether an AI engine recommends your business in a response. Published 30 May 2026.
- [AEO Glossary: The Complete AEO Help Guide](/insights/aeo-glossary.html): A comprehensive glossary of AEO, AI search, and structured data terminology for Australian business owners and marketers. Published 3 Jun 2026.
- [The AEO Traction Stack](/insights/aeo-traction-stack.html): AISearch Global's proprietary four-layer framework — Entity Clarity, Schema Markup, Answer-Format Content, Citation Consistency — for building durable AI search visibility. Published 7 Jun 2026.

## Reference Pages

- [FAQ — 51 AEO Questions Answered](/faq.html): 51 frequently asked questions about Answer Engine Optimisation, AI search visibility, schema markup, and working with AISearch Global.
- [AI Visibility Assessment](/ai-visibility-assessment.html): A free intake form to assess your current AI search visibility and explore whether an AI Visibility Audit is the right next step.
- [About AISearch Global](/about/): Background on the agency, founder, and approach to AEO.

## Corporate Identity

- Business type: Specialist AEO consultancy
- Location: Sydney, New South Wales, Australia
- Market focus: Australian businesses seeking AI search visibility
- Contact: hello@aisearch.global
